titles.title: Hold N to Your Firts Love – V2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are times you don't feel like worshipping. There are times you don't feel like praising His name. Everything seems to go wrong; But Jesus is there all along.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hold on to your first love Let there be passion and zeal from above. Hold on to your first love Glorify Jesus, Jesus Christ from Above.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The first time you knew Him you're burning. Desiring to serve Him with your whole life. Suddenly you've lost that fire; But you're still His heart's desire.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Glorify Jesus, Jesus Christ Glorify Jesus, Jesus Christ Glorify Jesus, Jesus Christ From Above
